variants.title: Mann Filter WK 1175 x Fuel Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P550748
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER fuel filters remove unwanted and damaging dirt particles from the fuel and thus prevent possible damage. Thanks to the highest degree of separation and sealing, the fuel filter ensures functional reliability and optimum protection during the entire maintenance interval.

variants.title: Donaldson P550748 Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550748 Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard FS19591 Fuel Filter/Water Sep Spin-On | Replaces the Donaldson P550748
variants.description: Fleetguard® FS19591 fuel water separator spin-on works to remove water and other particulates and ensures clean fuel is delivered to your engine.Bottom of shell has internal threads to attach bowl. Bowl has external threads.
